name: Tipster's Choice
description: Draw 2 cards from deck, keep 1, return other to bottom

name: Corner the Market
description: Take any face-up stock from market for free

name: Pump and Dump
description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price immediately

name: Connected Broker
description: For rest of game, gain +$1 per stock when you sell

name: The Squeeze
description: Increase one stock by +2 OR decrease one stock by -2

name: Wild Speculation
description: Flip top card from deck, then increase OR decrease that stock by +/-3

name: Preferred Bidder
description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

name: Stock Certificate Forgery
description: Complete any one goal using one fewer card than required

name: Hostile Takeover
description: Choose another player, look at their hand, take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $5 from the bank
